candidates.label: Nano network-design detail-hero Candidate
candidates.prompt:
{
  "asset_type": "pure industrial background plate",
  "goal": "Create a premium, photorealistic background of an industrial network room. THE IMAGE MUST BE COMPLETELY FREE OF ANY EMBEDDED TEXT, SLOGANS, LOGOS, BUTTONS, OR WEBSITE UI ELEMENTS.",
  "technical_signals": {
    "lens": "24mm wide",
    "aperture": "f/8",
    "light_source": "bright, clean architectural lighting"
  },
  "spatial_positioning": [
    "perspective looking down a clean corridor of network racks",
    "overhead yellow cable trays prominent",
    "large area of empty negative space for future content"
  ],
  "color_restriction": "clean whites, silvers, prominent yellow/orange fiber trays.",
  "scene": "A pristine, highly structured industrial telecommunications and networking room.",
  "reality_anchors": [
    "overhead cable trays (ladder racks)",
    "enclosed network cabinets",
    "pristine facility architecture"
  ],
  "composition": {
    "format": "16:9",
    "hero_safe_area": "large empty area on one side or top for content"
  },
  "avoid": [
    "embedded text",
    "slogans",
    "logos",
    "buttons",
    "CTA elements",
    "website UI overlays",
    "graphic design artifacts",
    "watermarks",
    "fake headlines",
    "messy wiring"
  ]
}
candidates.notes: PURIFICATION RERUN: CLEAN BACKGROUND PLATE - NO TEXT/BUTTONS.

    "overhead yellow cable trays prominent",
    "large area of empty negative space for future content"
  ],
  "color_restriction": "clean whites, silvers, prominent yellow/orange fiber trays.. Must strictly use Rally Technology's signature Teal and Graphite palette.",

    "overhead cable trays (ladder racks)",
    "enclosed network cabinets",
    "pristine facility architecture"

  "composition": {
    "format": "16:9",
    "hero_safe_area": "preserve broad architectural negative space (dark/empty) for website content and CSS gradients",

  },
  "avoid": [
